purpose: Record the AMD MORI reference import and the current standalone tile-ready overlap evidence to map into TorchTitan MoE EP.

source_reference.role: AMD EP dispatch/combine, split send/recv, SHMEM, and tile-ready overlap reference

mori_api_findings.training_integration_caveat: The public Python dispatch/combine path is not a drop-in autograd replacement for TorchTitan's all_to_all_single_autograd path; training needs an autograd-safe dispatcher or an explicit backward integration.

torchtitan_mapping.target_path: Mori-backed EP dispatcher plus tile-ready expert output/registered-combine handoff
required_before_training_use: define forward layout contract from TorchTitan top_scores/selected_experts_indices to MORI dispatch records
preserve training autograd for dispatch/combine or implement custom backward
connect grouped expert GEMM output to MORI registered combine input for tile-ready overlap
validate against the PyTorch all-to-all dispatcher on 4x and 8x
profile overlap vs current all-to-all baseline
